title: potentilla × dispersa
intro: Potentilla × dispersa, also known as Trifoliate Cinquefoil, is a hybrid plant species within the Rosaceae family, resulting from the cross between Potentilla erecta and Potentilla norvegica. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Potentilla × dispersa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate menstrual cramps, and exhibit antiviral and antifungal activities. The herbal preparations of Potentilla × dispersa typically involve infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
